meta.name: sql-sp-generation
meta.title: Sql Sp Generation Skill
meta.description: Guidelines for generating SQL statements and stored procedures Triggers on: **/*.sql

actions.name: break long queries into multiple lines for readability

actions.name: use OUTPUT parameters for returning status information
